concept: Pitch me a sports game where athletes compete in precision gardening competitions across fantastical floating arboretums. Master techniques like topiary sculpting, rapid composting, and symphony conducting to orchestrate blooming patterns that impress the capricious nature spirit judges. Adapt your strategies to unpredictable weather patterns and spontaneous magical influences that can dramatically affect plant behavior. Rise through amateur circuits to the professional Green Gauntlet where the champion gardener is granted the legendary Golden Shears that can shape reality itself.
